name: Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 11 1/2 x 7 baking pan.
2. Melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over hot water. Set aside.
3. Cream sugar and eggs until light and fluffy. Gradually add flour, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix in melted chocolate and butter, vanilla, and pecans.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 18 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and cover with marshmallows. Return to the oven and bake until the marshmallows are lightly browned.
7. Cool slightly and cut into bars.
